title: Upon Lungs. Epig.
content:
Lungs, as some say, ne'er sets him down to eat
    But that his breath does fly-blow all the meat.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Lungs. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
